overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a highly active and specialized social media presence across Bluesky, LinkedIn, and Mastodon, reaching a combined audience of 3,580 followers. His content consistently attracts strong engagement from academic and research communities, focusing primarily on computational social science, disinformation studies, and platform analysis tools. With a total of 426 engagement actions across 7 posts, his overall profile-level engagement rate stands at an impressive 11.9%, indicating a highly receptive and interactive audience.

contentThemes.description: Announcements of research tools and algorithms, specifically the CooRnet v2.0 release for detecting coordinated link sharing.
Postings for research grants, postdoctoral vacancies, and PhD student recruitment in computational social science.
Sharing newly published papers, conference presentations, and theoretical discussions on platform disinformation research.

recommendations: Maximize the high engagement rate on Bluesky (18.4% platform-specific ER) by sharing multi-post threads that break down methodology and technical insights of newly published papers.
Utilize LinkedIn's larger follower base (1,850 followers) more frequently for career opportunity postings, as professional opportunities generate high absolute interaction volumes and comments.
Introduce visual assets, such as system architecture diagrams for CooRnet or data visualizations from recent papers, to further boost click-through and sharing metrics across all platforms.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky serves as the most interactive platform, yielding an outstanding 18.4% collective engagement rate across its posts. It is an ideal space for immediate community discussions, sharing paper publications, and student recruitment.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon represents a highly dedicated and technical niche, achieving a 9.1% engagement rate. Technical tool updates like CooRnet v2.0 perform well here, showing an audience that values software-level research advancements.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn is the primary driver of absolute engagement metrics (180 total interactions) due to its larger reach. It behaves as a key professional channel, particularly effective for high-impact achievements like grant awards and postdoctoral hiring.

topPerformingContent.content: Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.
Our team has just released v2.0 of CooRnet, with improved algorithms for detecting coordinated link sharing behavior.
